query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "from chatbot to digital colleague: the paradigm shift toward persisten" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies acceptance criteria (a) and (b) by addressing the core mechanism of "persistent" digital colleagues (long-lived identities and trust) and measuring the specific domain of LLM-based agents, which is the central subject of the user's follow-up research on extending the "Digital Colleague" paradigm.
